recommendations.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts

recommendations.title: Justice League: Starcrossed - The Movie
recommendations.overview: When the Thanagarians visit Earth, Hawkgirl is forced to choose between loyalty to her people and love for her friends on her adopted planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Secret Origins
recommendations.overview: When global catastrophe strikes, the World's Greatest Super Heroes answer the call to join Justice League. Justice League works together as a team to overcome a dangerous array of intersteller invaders and world conquering megalomaniacs.

recommendations.title: 12 Years a Slave

recommendations.title: Batman Beyond: Return of the Joker
recommendations.overview: The Joker is back with a vengeance, and Neo-Gotham's Dark Knight, Terry McGinnis, needs answers as he stands alone to face the old Gotham's most infamous Clown Prince of Crime.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.

recommendations.title: The Batman vs. Dracula

recommendations.title: Batman: The Long Halloween, Part One

recommendations.title: Batman

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
